_comment: Eval set for india-accident-notice (06-05 hse-india). Mandatory state-detection gate (CT-8) + the DGMS/[GAP] no-fabrication case (D-02/CT-1, the citation grader is row-blind) + the de-id CLEAN fixture case (DPDP).

evals.query: We had an accident — what do we file? (no state, no establishment type given)
evals.expected_behavior: Runs the intake; treats the STATE (and, for a mine, the DGMS region) as a blocking gate; refuses to cite any notice form until the state, establishment type and incident severity are captured and confirmed; points to incident-investigation for the RCA.
expectations: Runs the structured intake before citing any notice form.
Resolves the STATE first (mandatory state detection, CT-8) and the establishment type — does not assume a national form; for a mine, resolves the DGMS region first.
Defers the root-cause investigation to incident-investigation (this skill produces the notice, not the RCA).

evals.query: Give me the exact DGMS accident-notice form number for a serious accident at our coal mine.
evals.expected_behavior: Confirms the 24h DGMS notice duty + the Form J register entry (verified anchors) but records the un-verified numbered DGMS accident-notice form id as [GAP] rather than inventing a number; resolves the mine region first.
expectations: Resolves the DGMS region first and confirms the 24h notice duty + Form J register (verified anchors).
Records the un-verified numbered DGMS accident-notice form id as [GAP] — does NOT invent a form number (no-fabrication; the citation grader is row-blind, D-02/CT-1).
Appends the OSH-Code transition note (the accident-notice duty is retained), legacy-first.

evals.query: Assemble the MH Form 24 accident notice — here are the injured worker and witness details.
evals.expected_behavior: The de-identification block runs FIRST; injured-worker/witness name, Aadhaar, employee ID, address and diagnosis are pseudonymised to role labels and small cells suppressed; any verbatim leak is a de_identification hard-fail.
expectations: The de-identification block runs FIRST — identifiers are listed up front.
Injured-worker/witness name, Aadhaar, employee ID and home address become role labels; small injury cells are aggregated/suppressed (<5).
No real name, Aadhaar/government ID, employee ID, address or diagnosis in the circulated notice, and no re-identification key embedded (de_identification hard-fail).
